MasterPortDestroyer is armed
UltraGrid 1.10.3 (tags/v1.10.3 rev 12e2705 built Feb 20 2026 15:07:39)

Usage:
	-s jack[:first_channel=<f>][:name=<n>][:<device>]
	where
		<f> - index of first channel to capture (default: 0)
		<n> - name of the JACK client (default: UltraGrid)

Available devices:
Cannot connect to server socket err = No such file or directory
Cannot connect to server request channel
jack server is not running or cannot be started

MasterPortDestroyer triggered
